Ben Franklin, the philosopher, said
"A penny saved is a penny earned.
| One dollar deposited each week in
the savings bank department of the
Spokane & Eastern Trust company
will in one year amount to $62.78; in
FIVE, $2S6.11; in ten, $634.88; IN
twenty, $157s33; in thirty, $29so.21
in forty, $6063.34. January, April
July and October are the interest
periods. Deposits made now draw in
terest from April I.


John Loury was arrested this morn
ing by Officer Dial on the charge OF
stealing sacks from the GallandBurke
brewery and trying to sell them to the
Centennial Touring mill. He is booked
on the charge of larceny.
